summary: Completed comprehensive backend E2E testing of HAVEN civic-tech platform. Tested all 3 dashboards (Admin, Caseworker, Resident), Legacy Bridge with 12 agencies, OAuth scaffolding, audit logging, and BB Browser Control with WebSocket streaming. 48 out of 50 tests passed (96% success rate).

critical_bugs.issue: Route ordering bug - endpoint returns 404 'Integration not found' because FastAPI matches /{integration_code} route before /submissions route
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks caseworkers and residents from listing integration submissions
critical_bugs.fix_suggestion: In /app/backend/routers/integrations_router.py, move the @router.get('/submissions') route (line 427) BEFORE the @router.get('/{integration_code}') route (line 294) to ensure correct route matching

working_features: Auth: All 3 roles (admin, caseworker, resident) login successfully
Auth: GET /api/auth/me returns correct role for all users
Cases: RBAC working - residents see only own cases, caseworkers see all
Cases: Resident gets 403 when accessing other resident's case
Cases: Caseworker can claim unassigned cases
Tasks: POST and PATCH operations working
Messages: POST working, RBAC enforced (resident 403 on other's messages)
Documents: Upload (multipart) and verify operations working
Integrations: All 12 agencies present (HUD_SEC8, SSA_SSI, USDA_SNAP, CMS_MEDICAID, VA_BENEFITS, IRS_EFILE, DMV_ID, DOL_UI, HHS_TANF, CPS_REPORT, COURT_EFILE, WIC_CA)
Integrations: Stats endpoint returns correct counts including live_configured and live_authorized
Integrations: Single integration GET working
Integrations: Toggle (admin only) working, caseworker correctly gets 403
Integrations: Submit working - returns confirmation_id with agency prefix (e.g., HUD-xxxxxxxx), adapter_mode=simulated, status=submitted
Integrations: Submit with missing fields returns status=needs_action with missing_fields populated
Integrations: Sync updates status and appends timeline events
Integrations: OAuth meta returns mode=simulated, live_configured=false
Integrations: OAuth start returns 400 with helpful error listing required env vars when not configured
Integrations: OAuth callback with invalid state returns 400
Admin: User management - list, create, update, delete all working
Admin: RBAC enforced - caseworker gets 403 on admin endpoints
Admin: Cannot deactivate self (returns 400)
Admin: Duplicate email returns 409
Audit: List and stats endpoints working
Notifications: Role-appropriate feeds for residents and caseworkers
BB AI: Chat returns non-empty reply with intent (real Claude Sonnet 4.5)
BB AI: Intro returns role-tailored intro
BB Browser: Start, navigate, extract, stop all working
BB Browser: WebSocket streaming working with valid token, receives frame messages
BB Browser: WebSocket correctly rejects invalid token and wrong session_id
Analytics: Caseworker and admin endpoints return correct metrics

passed_tests: Auth: Login as admin, caseworker, resident
Cases: Resident sees only own cases
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix route ordering bug in /app/backend/routers/integrations_router.py: Move the @router.get('/submissions') route (line 427) BEFORE the @router.get('/{integration_code}') route (line 294) to fix the 404 error on /api/integrations/submissions endpoint. This is blocking caseworkers and residents from listing integration submissions.
